title: The NSA Is Quietly Plugging Anthropic's AI Into Its Cyber Ops
script: The National Security Agency is integrating Anthropic's new Mythos AI into its cyber operations. Mythos is a hardened version of Claude. The deal value is classified but reported in the hundreds of millions. The NSA will use it to write offensive code, analyze foreign malware, and run intrusion simulations. Anthropic says strict guardrails are in place. Critics counter that the agency now has a frontier AI model with no public oversight.
